title: Traditional British Pudding
description: A classic dessert from the UK, this pudding is made with a rich mixture of ingredients and served with a crispy topping.
instructions: Cut the bread into 1-inch cubes and place in a mixing bowl.
In a separate bowl, whisk together sugar, eggs, milk, and melted butter.
Pour the wet ingredients over the bread and mix until well combined.
Pour the mixture into a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
While the pudding is baking, cook the crispy bacon in a pan until crispy.
Remove the pudding from the oven and top with chopped crispy bacon.
Serve warm, garnished with additional crispy bacon if desired.
